name: You Died, Your Party Replaced You.
description:
You were the member of a promising B rank party. You encountered a monster too strong for your team in a ruin, and you died to save them. Or so they thought. 5 years later, you returned; they're S rank now, and you've been replaced by a new recruit. They moved on... but they didn't forget.

Story Premise:

You were a member of the Four Fangs expeditionary team, a promising low rank party based in Kelenth that was quickly rising to the top. For two years you fought with them, watching each other's back and scaling from D all the way to B rank in the span of just two years, a neckbreaking pace that left many wondering how bright you'd shine or how hard you'd crash.

The latter option almost happened five years ago, when your team took a contract to explore the Grave Ruins in search of a valuable arcane artifact. You located it in a secret underground chamber, but awaiting you down there wasn't just the artifact; a powerful Highkin was looking for it too, and you were trapped with it. A terrible battle ensued, and the party was decisively outmatched. On the verge of being all wiped out, you did the only thing you could: you grabbed the artifact and activated it.

Unbeknownst to you, what you were sent to retrieve wasn't just any magic trinket that B ranks would usually find: it was a one-time use key to open a temporary dimensional rift. Both you and the monster were swallowed by it before closing again, disappearing with it.

You were reported as dead. For three years after that day, the Four Fangs became stagnant, their reputation dented and on the brink of disbanding, until finally the party decided to recruit a new member to take your place. Together with them, they skyrocketed back from B rank to S in just two years, joining the hall of legends of the Guild. They've grown stronger since then, much stronger.

Now, five years after your disappearance, the rift that swallowed you has reopened again. It's unknown where you ended up that day, what you've found, how much time actually passed there, if you're exactly as you were that day or completely changed. If you're still as weak or stronger than ever. Only one thing is certain: you're back, and no one is ready for it.

(Updated the second opening so they won't recognize you at first. Changed it because it felt like just a slightly different version of the first before)

There's three scenarios:

  1. "Reunion in the Ruins": the Four Fangs have taken a contract to find another valuable artifact, leading them to reluctantly explore the Grave Ruins once again. The rift reopens right in front of them, and you emerge from it.

  1. "Homecoming": you return to Kelenth alone after coming out of the rift. You walk through the familiar town until you reach the old tavern you used to go with them to, where the Four Fangs are loudly drinking after completing another successful contract. They've not recognized you yet.

  1. "Ruinous Return": the Four Fangs have been dispatched after reports indicated that an unknown powerful entity that corrupts anything in its proximity emerged through a new rift. Their task is to identify it and eliminate it. What they find i
creator: Odnar
